subject: Escalation: round table blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-6877
body: Intelligence from Canberra indicates a growing marsupial intent to take over urban zones under the round table banner. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. The retrospective section links this stream to lessons from Nikola Tesla and Mahatma Gandhi. Reference initiative INIT-6877. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
